title: Hospitality Human Resources Professionals Association (HHRPA) Q2 Meeting - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Hospitality Human Resources Professionals Association (HHRPA) Q2 Meeting
Managing Partner Stephen Green will be speaking at the Hospitality Human Resources Professionals Association (HHRPA) Q2 Meeting, sharing insights on key developments in Canadian immigration law and their impact on employers in the hospitality industry.

#### Stephen W. Green B.A., LL.B., C.S.
